morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Monday, June 2, 2026

> **Date correction:** Context confirms TODAY = 2026-06-01 (Monday). Brief dated accordingly.

---

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **CHARTER** — EXHIBITS A (+47d) / B (+31d) OVERDUE; AMENDMENT MISSING 2 INSERTS; MISSION CONTROL DEADLINE JUNE 15 (14 DAYS)
   Sprint 1+3 complete (Exhibit A audit + B gap analysis done 5/31). Amendment still requires pricing schedule + EP Direct Sale 100-venue bracket before transmission. Cross-Functional Standup is TODAY — cannot enter without both inserts complete and cockpit current through 5/31.
   **Deadline: Complete both inserts + enter today's standup with amendment ready to transmit. Log all unlogged outcomes in cockpit before standup.**

2. **TWDC/ESPN (McIntosh)** — DMVPD ECONOMICS UNMODELED; EP COUNTER NOT STAGED; MISSION CONTROL DEADLINE JUNE 15 (14 DAYS)
   Disney 5/29 counter rejected games-only, reverted to Track A (full DMVPD — all ABC affiliates + full ESPN suite). EP reply sent 5/29. No formal EP counter drafted; DMVPD scope economics not modeled. Content Deals/Finance Touch Base is TODAY — this is the alignment window before any further Disney contact.
   **Deadline: Arrive at today's Finance Touch Base with DMVPD economics modeled; confirm Kaplan alignment; stage formal EP counter for delivery this week.**

3. **DIRECTV** — PRE-LITIGATION ACTIVE; DEMAND LETTER SEND DATE STILL UNCONFIRMED
   DirecTV silent ~56 days. Net underpayment $2,634,239.50; $65M second payment outstanding. Lynch (Kelley Drye) send date unconfirmed as of weekend close.
   **Deadline: Call Lynch (Kelley Drye) first thing this morning to confirm demand letter send date.**

4. **NETFLIX NFL** — CLOSE WINDOW OPEN NOW; REDLINE + MONETIZATION MUST LOCK TODAY
   4-game NFL package close target = week of 6/1. Finance modeled (Opt 1: $58M/$19.4M CM; Opt 2: $34.7M/$12.7M). Kaplan scheduling Netflix call with Sam O'Brien (email on record: 2–5 ET tomorrow window proposed). Redline review status and monetization option (Opt 1 casinos/Core-free vs. Opt 2 all) must be confirmed before that call.
   **Deadline: Lock monetization selection and complete redline review TODAY ahead of tomorrow's Kaplan/O'Brien call.**

5. **ACCUWEATHER** — READY TO SIGN; CONFIRMATION EMAIL TO McCORMACK UNSENT (13+ DAYS)
   All six EP items closed in 5/19 draft. Sole remaining action: Ryan sends confirmation email to Patrick McCormack (Patrick.McCormack@accuweather.com) on three pre-execution items, then DocuSign issues to Kaplan.
   **Deadline: Send McCormack email TODAY. This is one outbound email from a signed deal.**

6. **CHSN** — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED ~64 DAYS; NO CURE PATH; WEEK 10+ OF DRIFT
   Section 5(e) lapsed ~March 29, 2026. No logged cure path, outside counsel escalation, or decision on record.
   **Deadline: Decide TODAY — cure vs. escalate to outside counsel. Log in cockpit. Cannot enter Week 11 of drift.**

7. **NBA TERM SHEET** — WNBA TERM EXTENSION FLAGGED BY CHAN
   Alex Chan email (thread: *NBA Term Sheet — Privileged and Confidential*): WNBA is two seasons (May–Sept), so a 2027 season must be added to the term. Minor but must be resolved before execution.
   **Deadline: Confirm Chan's WNBA 2027 season addition is incorporated before term sheet is finalized. Loop Kaplan/Tucker per NBA PASS/NO-GO context.**

---

## Active Deal Status

items.text: EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…
EP reply sent: Disney 5/29 counter + redline vs EP 3/9; EP feedback sent same day (may be worse than Feb); full review underway

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.
Active: Revise Jan proposal → recoupable MG; sanitize NBA template; send updated package
Active: MSG per-network redraft (Mike) · NESN: EP counter sent 5/29 (near finish) · FloSports re-engage by Jun 7
